FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Agentic governance, Witness AI Flow, and AI policy at dispatch.

Are you certified to NIST, ISO, or EU AI Act?

No. Witness AI maps workflows to these frameworks for operational alignment — educational mapping only, not certification or legal compliance advice. See Sources.

What is agentic governance?

Governing autonomous and semi-autonomous agent workflows at execution time — AI policy eval, human approve gates, and signed receipts on every irreversible agent action.

What is Witness AI Flow?

First agentic install: intake → policy eval → human gate → execute → audit → prove · 6 receipt types · replay demo · export bundle · 2–3 weeks.

What AI policies ship out of the box?

Acceptable use, data handling, tool boundaries, human escalation triggers, and red-line BLOCK rules — versioned on disk and enforced at dispatch.

Educational or legal advice?

Educational policy templates only — not legal advice. See Observe principles.

Which lane?

Witness AI Flow

Agentic governance workflows on this site — runtime policy at dispatch, signed receipts, replay proof.

Witness AI provides educational AI policy templates and governance workflow tooling — not legal, compliance, or certification services. Market statistics cite independent third-party research. Framework alignment is illustrative mapping only.
